descriptionHtml:
IVAR 30 m BSY for sale 2016 | Fully-equipped | Tax not paid

If you are in search of a reliable and stylish mega yacht, the IVAR 30 m BSY for sale 2016 presents an appealing opportunity. This yacht is FULLY EQUIPPED, it's a fine example from the renowned Black Sea Yachts shipyard, built to high standards in 2016 and thoughtfully maintained to ensure she remains in good condition. Whether you’re seeking a capable vessel for long-distance cruising or a comfortable platform for family getaways, the vessel stands out as a practical choice for discerning buyers.

Inside, the IVAR 30 m BSY for sale 2016 is designed with comfort and functionality in mind. The layout caters to both relaxation and practical needs, allowing owners and guests to enjoy extended stays aboard. While the interior style is inviting, it also maintains an understated elegance that makes the yacht suitable for various occasions, from quiet family vacations to social gatherings on water.

Specifications:

  • Model: IVAR 30 m Black Sea Yachts
  • Year Built: 2016
  • Material: Aluminium hull and superstructure
  • Overall Length: 29.1 metres
  • Engines: x2 MAN D2842 LE412 diesels
  • Power Output: 800 hp each engine
  • Cruising Speed: 10 knots
  • Maximum Hull Speed: 12 knots
  • Range: 5,000 nmi
  • Windlass: Electric for convenient anchoring

The IVAR 30 m BSY for sale 2016 remains in good condition, having been cared for by her current owners. Regular maintenance and updates have kept her systems and appearance up to standard, providing confidence for future owners about her operational reliability and ongoing enjoyment.

If you are considering upgrading or investing in a FULLY EQUIPPED mega yacht that combines a balance between performance, durability, and onboard comfort, the IVAR 30 m BSY for sale 2016 is your option. This vessel offers flexibility for extended coastal or offshore cruising, with the resilience and capability required for safety and enjoyment at sea. For further details or to arrange a viewing, don't hesitate to reach out!!
